title: Smart Greenhouse Monitor
summary: Track soil moisture, light, and temperature with live alerts on your phone.
longDescription: Build a greenhouse dashboard that continuously checks soil and climate conditions, then alerts you when plants need attention. This project teaches sensor calibration, edge processing, and practical automation.
stepsPreview: Set up a Python data polling loop
Create a simple dashboard with charts

title: Retro Arcade Console
summary: Turn your Raspberry Pi into a polished living-room arcade with curated ROM management.
longDescription: Create a couch-friendly retro gaming console with a clean game launcher, controller pairing, and automatic save backups. Great for learning Linux imaging, system tuning, and media center UX.
outcomes: Flash and configure a custom OS image

title: Home Network Ad Blocker
summary: Block ads and trackers for every device on your network with one Pi.
longDescription: Deploy a DNS-level ad blocker for your full household. Learn networking fundamentals, DNS behavior, and dashboard-based monitoring while improving browsing speed and privacy.
outcomes: Analyze blocked domains and client activity

title: Weather Station with E-Ink Display
summary: Show local weather metrics on a low-power e-ink display you can read in sunlight.
longDescription: Build a desktop weather panel that pulls online forecast data and combines it with local sensor readings. You will practice APIs, display drivers, and efficient rendering updates.
outcomes: Pull and normalize weather API data
stepsPreview: Set up SPI and I2C interfaces

title: AI Birdhouse Camera
summary: Detect and classify birds visiting your feeder with on-device inference.
longDescription: Create a motion-triggered wildlife camera that labels common bird species. This project combines computer vision, camera optimization, and dataset-driven inference on constrained hardware.
outcomes: Run lightweight image models on edge hardware
Tune capture settings for outdoor scenes
Build event clips and labeled snapshots

title: Garage Door Status Bot
summary: Get instant phone alerts if your garage door stays open too long.
longDescription: Use magnetic reed sensors to monitor garage door state and trigger smart reminders. This is a practical home automation project with clear day-to-day value.
outcomes: Publish alerts via Telegram or Slack

title: Kubernetes Pi Homelab Cluster
summary: Build a 3-node Raspberry Pi cluster for container learning and self-hosting.
longDescription: Learn modern DevOps workflows by deploying lightweight Kubernetes across multiple Pi nodes. You will configure networking, storage, and production-like deployments.

title: Smart Mirror Daily Brief
summary: Display weather, calendar, and transit updates on a hallway mirror.
longDescription: Turn an old monitor and one-way mirror into a practical daily dashboard. You will work with web rendering, API integrations, and kiosk reliability.

title: Pi NAS Backup Box
summary: Create a private backup appliance for laptops and photos.
longDescription: Build a low-cost NAS with scheduled backups and basic versioning. Ideal for learning storage, file sharing, and backup retention strategy.

title: Voice-Controlled Kitchen Timer
summary: Start and manage multiple cooking timers hands-free.
longDescription: This assistant-style timer responds to voice commands and provides audible reminders. A practical beginner-to-intermediate intro to wake words and audio processing.
outcomes: Provide spoken and visual status updates

title: Motion Detection Security Node
summary: Build a room monitor that records short clips when motion is detected.
longDescription: Use PIR sensors and camera capture to create a local, privacy-first security node. Learn event-triggered recording and storage retention controls.
outcomes: Trigger camera capture on GPIO events

title: Bike Computer and GPS Logger
summary: Track ride speed, distance, and elevation with offline maps.
longDescription: Create a custom cycling dashboard with GPS logging and post-ride analysis. This project combines sensor sampling, geospatial data, and battery-aware design.

title: Multi-Room Audio Streamer
summary: Stream synchronized music to multiple rooms from one control panel.
longDescription: Set up networked Pi endpoints for synchronized audio playback. Learn about low-latency streaming, service orchestration, and dependable home networking.

title: 3D Printer Farm Dashboard
summary: Monitor multiple printers and queue jobs from one Raspberry Pi hub.
longDescription: Build a dashboard for printer status, camera feeds, and filament tracking. This project is ideal for makers running more than one printer at home or in a workshop.

title: LED Music Visualizer
summary: Convert live audio into responsive RGB lighting effects.
longDescription: A fast win for beginners who want visible results. Learn basic audio analysis and LED strip control while building a room-friendly ambient visualizer.
outcomes: Tune visual effects for smooth transitions
